item.name: Horned Frog
item.description:
The appendages that protude above its eyes earned this frog its rather unimaginative appellation.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This creature's bulbous brownish body helps it blend among fallen leaves and other dead vegetation. Readily identified by the protrusions above its eyes, it is said to detest having its horns mocked. Alas, no horned frog has ever learned the common tongue to corroborate this belief.
